Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor - Leonard Whiteley.
Off Calendar Jun-10-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Dean A. Hanley, Esq. and Young S. Lee, Esq. appeared for petitioner Leonard Whiteley, the Guardian ad Litem for the minors Carl Whiteley and Elizabeth Whiteley.
Order waiving petitioner's appearance at today's hearing was filed on May 3, 2010.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

As to Carl Whiteley:
Settlement Amount - $596,853.80.
Attorney's Fees - $233,940.78.
Costs - $167,767.75.

The net balance of $195,145.27 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, located at 205 West Ojai Avenue, Ojai, CA 93023. No withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

As to Elizabeth Whiteley:
Settlement Amount - $596,853.80.
Attorney's Fees - $233,940.78.
Costs - $167,767.75.

The net balance of $195,145.27 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, located at 205 West Ojai Avenue, Ojai, CA 93023. No withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.
